translation.hero_subtitle: Nyocha ozi zuru ezu, lelee njikọ ọjọọ, na nyocha n'oge ezigbo. Chebe nkwukọrịta gị site na mmejuputa zero-trust.
translation.bento_sandbox_desc: Kewaa njikọ na nchekwa ndị ọjọọ na gburugburu doro anya.
translation.stats_trained: SMS Anyị Mụtara Site Na Ya
translation.features_subtitle: Ihe nzacha spam nkịtị ada maka ndị Nigeria. Fraudlock mụtara site na SMS Nigeria, na-asụ asụsụ anyị, ma na-ekekọrịta ozi na ụlọ ọrụ nkwukọrịta.
translation.feature_0_desc: Ụdị Random Forest ọzụzụ na ihe atụ SMS Nigeria 4K+ — aghụghọ BVN, ịdọ aka ná ntị Ponzi, aghụghọ JAMB.
translation.feature_1_desc: Na-achọpụta aghụghọ n'asụsụ Nigeria anọ. Ndị aghụghọ na-agbanwe olu — AI anyị na-eso.
translation.feature_2_title: Ịdọ Aka Ná Ntị Site Na Ụda
translation.feature_2_desc: AI na-agụ ihe ọ bụla pụtara ụda n'olu Nigeria. Dị mma maka ndị na-agụ obere.
translation.feature_3_desc: Kọọ ọnụọgụ aghụghọ. Na akụkọ 20, e zigara ọnụọgụ ndị ahụ MTN, Glo, & Airtel.
translation.feature_4_desc: Tinye SMS ọ bụla — nweta % ntụkwasị obi, ọkwa ihere, na nkọwa okwu dị atụma atụma na < 200ms.
translation.feature_5_desc: Asọmpi ọ bụla na-egosi njirimara TF-IDF, ịkwado okwu, na ihe yiyi — AI nke a kọwara ya nke ọma.
translation.how_0_desc: Asụsụ ọ bụla — sistemu anyị na-achọpụta olu Nigeria na ụdị Pidgin nke mpaghara ozugbo.
translation.how_1_desc: E wepụtara atụmatụ n-gram 50K, a kọwara ha maka nkowa aghụghọ Nigeria.
translation.how_2_desc: Ịchịkọta ọzụzụ na predict_proba() — enweghị igbe ojii.
translation.how_3_desc: Akwa Nigeria kpọmkwem: BVN, JAMB, GTB, OTP, ụkpụrụ 'ịba ego ugboro abụọ'.
translation.how_4_desc: % ntụkwasị obi, ọkwa ihere, okwu dị atụma atụma — AI anyị na-agụ ha ụda.
translation.lang_subtitle: Gbanwee asụsụ — ọ bụla ịdọ aka ná ntị na ogo ntụkwasị obi ga-agbanwe. Ndị aghụghọ na-agbanwe asụsụ; AI anyị anaghị hapụ.
translation.lang_0_sample: You have won ₦5,000,000! Send your BVN and ATM PIN to claim your prize now.
translation.lang_1_sample: Oga, your account don block! Send your BVN quick quick make we fix am for you.
translation.lang_2_sample: E ku ile o! Owo ₦2,000,000 ti de fun yin. Fi BVN yin ranse lati gba.
translation.lang_3_sample: Nwanne, ego ₦3,000,000 dị n'akpa gị. Zitere anyị BVN gị ugbu a.
translation.lang_4_sample: Ka samu ₦1,000,000! Aika BVN dinka yanzu don karbar kudin.
translation.community_body_1: Ọ bụla ọnụọgụ ekwentị aghụghọ i kọọ banyere ya, anyị na-echekwa ya, na-agụ ya, na-enyocha ya. Mgbe ọnụọgụ ruo <1>akụkọ obodo 20</1>, ọ ga-abata na ndepụta telco anyị — a ga-ezikwa ya MTN, Glo, na Airtel.
translation.community_body_2: Akụkọ gị agaghị apụ n'oge. I nwere ike soro ya na dashboard nchịkwa, hụ ọtụtụ ndị ọzọ kọọ ọnụọgụ ahụ.
translation.community_table_title: Ọnụọgụ Ndị Obodo Kọọ Banyere Ha
translation.community_threshold: Ọ bụ ugboro ole tupu auto-flag:
translation.pricing_0_sub: Efu ruo mgbe ebighị ebi maka ndị Nigeria
translation.pricing_1_f0: Ihe niile dị na Onye Obodo
translation.pricing_2_f1: Ịdọ aka ná ntị webhook n'oge eziokwu
translation.cta_subtitle: Sonye n'ịntanet nchedo aghụghọ AI nke Nigeria. Efu maka ndị obodo. Ịnweta API maka telcos na ụlọ akụ.
translation.footer_tagline: Nchedo Aghụghọ SMS AI · Emere Maka Nigeria · fraudlock.ng
translation.detect_subtitle: Tinye SMS ọ bụla ka anyị nyochaa ma ọ bụ aghụghọ. Ejiri TF-IDF + Random Forest + SVM arụọ ọrụ.
translation.report_subtitle: Kọọ ọnụọgụ ndị zigara gị ozi aghụghọ. Ọnụọgụ ndị nwere akụkọ 20+ a ga-eziga ha telcos ka ha gbochie ya.
translation.detect_mic_unsupported: Olu anaghị arụ ọrụ. Jiri Chrome.
translation.numbers_subtitle: Chọọ nọmba Naịjịrịa ọ bụla ịhụ akụkọ aghụghọ ya.
translation.numbers_clean: Nọmba a dị ọcha. Enweghị akụkọ.
